1_data_collection.description: Pull all raw data from source systems

what_it_provides: AP disbursements (vendor payments cleared by date)
netsuite_mcp.query_approach: SuiteQL: SELECT date, account, amount, entity FROM Transaction WHERE type IN ('VendPymt','CustPymt','Check','Deposit') AND trandate = SYSDATE-1
netsuite_mcp.unit: USD thousands (divide by 1000 to match model)
gaps: Does not contain payroll detail (ADP feeds NS summary only)
MERCH vendor terms may lag actual bank posting by 1-2 days
JPM bank position is authoritative; NS GL may have timing differences

what_it_provides: Payroll funding date and gross amount by pay group
Employer taxes and benefits (FICA, FUTA, SUTA)
adp_payroll.frequency: Bi-weekly per pay cycle; preview file available T-3 days
adp_payroll.latency: File available by 06:00 ET on pay dates, otherwise prior file

jpm_bank_position.delivery: BAI2 file via SFTP or JPM ACCESS API
jpm_bank_position.format: BAI2 standard; parse with bai2 Python library

what_it_provides: Merchandise AP aging by vendor and due date
merch_feed.delivery: Internal ERP extract or shared drive: /merch/ap_aging_{YYYYMMDD}.xlsx
merch_feed.note: May require manual upload if no API; flagged for future automation

non_merch_feed.delivery: NetSuite MCP (AP subledger) supplemented by internal categorization map
non_merch_feed.latency: Available same time as NS pull

xlsb_team_template.description: Structural shell file (no data, all formulas/formatting intact)
xlsb_team_template.role: File generation target — data is injected into named ranges
xlsb_team_template.note: openpyxl cannot read .xlsb; template must be maintained as .xlsx clone or use xlwings for xlsb

2_data_transformation.description: Normalize, categorize, and reconcile raw data before injection

steps.detail: All sources → USD thousands (÷1000). JPM BAI2 is in cents (÷100000)
Map vendor/entity IDs to BU using NS custom segment or internal mapping table (CSV lookup)
Tag each disbursement as MERCH, Non-Merch, Payroll, Interco, Tax, CapEx
Apply float calendar: check clearance +1 day, ACH +1 day, wire same day
Inflows positive, outflows negative. Verify NS AP = negative, AR = positive
Sum BU-level to consolidated; eliminate interco entries
Compare yesterday's forecast cells to JPM actuals; compute variance; flag >$500K misses

3_file_generation.description: Write transformed data into the Excel template
3_file_generation.approach: openpyxl write-only mode for data sheets; preserve formula sheets untouched

steps.detail: shutil.copy(template_path, output_path). Never modify master template.
Load clone, keep all formulas intact
Write NS daily actuals to FY File sheet: date column + BU rows. This is the data spine.
Write ADP pay dates and amounts by BU/pay group
Write MERCH AP aging detail (vendor, amount, due date)
Write Non-Merch AP detail from NS subledger
Write JPM prior-day balance to bank balance summary row (feeds opening balance)
Write today's date to cover/title cell
wb.save(output_path); log file hash for audit trail

4_quality_checks.description: Automated QC before file is distributed

checks.rule: Total ending cash (Cash Flow sheet) == JPM bank balance
checks.action_on_fail: FLAG – do not distribute; alert treasury

checks.rule: Inflows Detail total > 0 for each weekday (no silent zero days)
checks.action_on_fail: FLAG – possible NS data feed failure

checks.rule: MERCH disbursements within ±30% of rolling 5-day average
checks.action_on_fail: WARN – requires analyst review before distribution

checks.rule: If today is a payroll date (ADP calendar), payroll disbursement > $0
checks.action_on_fail: FLAG – ADP file may be missing

checks.rule: Actual vs. prior-day forecast variance < $1M per BU
checks.action_on_fail: WARN – log variance for monthly attribution report

checks.rule: No #REF!, #VALUE!, #N/A errors in key output cells
checks.action_on_fail: FLAG – template may be corrupted; roll back to prior version

checks.rule: Output file size within 20% of prior day file size
checks.action_on_fail: FLAG – data truncation or corruption suspected

monitoring.sla: File delivered by 08:00 ET; QC report attached
